meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.lead: Nexografix (“we”, “our”, “us”) is committed to protecting the privacy and security of personal and business information shared with us through our website, platforms, and services. This policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect information when you interact with Nexografix and its products, including Arohio.ai.

blocks.value: 1. Information We Collect

We collect information only where it is necessary to provide our services, respond to requests, and maintain secure and reliable operations. The information we collect depends on how you interact with Nexografix and products such as Arohio.ai.

items.title: Contact Information
items.description: Name, email address, phone number, organization name, and role when you submit forms, request a demo, or contact us for services.

items.title: Business Information
items.description: Service requirements, project scope, communication details, and operational inputs you share for proposals, delivery planning, or enterprise onboarding.

items.title: Technical Information
items.description: IP address, device/browser details, approximate location (city/region), logs, and usage analytics for security monitoring, rate-limiting, diagnostics, and platform performance.

items.title: Uploaded Content
items.description: Documents, datasets, or files submitted through products such as Arohio.ai strictly for processing, extraction, transformation, automation, or analysis aligned with the service purpose.

blocks.value: We do not intentionally collect sensitive personal information (such as passwords, financial details, or government IDs) unless explicitly required for a particular contract or compliance workflow.
2. How We Use Information
Information is used strictly for legitimate, purpose-bound business operations. We do not use customer data for unsolicited marketing, resale, or unrelated profiling.

items: Service delivery including demos, onboarding, execution, and support
Product operations for platforms such as Arohio.ai
Security, fraud prevention, and compliance obligations

blocks.value: 3. Data Processing & AI Systems
Nexografix uses AI-enabled systems to enhance efficiency, accuracy, and scale across publishing, content, assessment, and automation workflows.
We do not use customer-uploaded data to train public or third-party AI models. Uploaded data is processed strictly for the intended service purpose.
4. Data Storage & Security
We implement layered security controls including encryption, access management, logging, and monitoring.
5. Data Sharing

items: Legal or regulatory authorities when required

blocks.value: 6. Cookies & Tracking
Our website may use cookies for session management, analytics, and performance optimization.
7. User Rights
You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information, subject to applicable laws.
8. Data Retention
We retain information only as long as necessary to fulfill contractual and legal obligations.
9. International Data Transfers
Data may be processed outside your country with appropriate safeguards in place.
10. Policy Updates
We may update this policy from time to time. Continued use indicates acceptance where permitted by law.
11. Contact Information
